title: The Children of Elbaf Panic
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Giants, Robin, Unknown person #5, Gerd, Unknown person #6 as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OW... my back... thanks for the hand, Saul.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't mention it! But what's the deal with the snake?!

dialogue.speaker: Giants
dialogue.text: Former giant warrior pirate PRINCIPAL KIBA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't know the principal was a warrior!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mr. Saul is as strong as they say!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He used to be a marine, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So there are monsters in the realm of the sun too, Saul?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You get the occasional wild animal, but this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YLVA and the others just walked off and they didn't say a word...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You're friends with that Luffy Guy, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Did he do something to you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Where did YLVA and the others go?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sir, what's wrong with them?! They looked like they were sleepwalking!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
